title: Amtech V0450 230mm (9") Metal cutting disc
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: DURABLE: This 230mm (9") metal cutting disc is made from high quality, fully resin bonded aluminium MPA certified to EN12413:2019
FEATURES: With a 230mm x 3mm x 22.23mm bore, it is designed for use with 230mm angle grinders up to a maximum speed of 6600 rpm
GARDEN ESSENTIAL: A must-have for all types of garden maintenance
LOCKING MECHANISM: Safety lock ensures secure storage after use
SMOOTH ACTION: Spring-loaded for easy repeated cutting
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 230mm Metal Cutting Disc See more
